description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a single story, featuring a spacious wraparound deck and a detached two-car garage. The exterior is finished in dark gray siding with white trim, and the structure includes multiple large windows that allow for ample natural light. The main entrance is accessible via a set of stairs leading up to the deck, which is bordered by wooden railings. The roof is flat, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic, and the building sits elevated above a partially exposed foundation. The layout includes several interior rooms visible from above, with open-plan living spaces and private bedrooms. The garage is positioned adjacent to the main building, connected by a short walkway.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wraparound deck, and detached two-car garage, finished in dark gray siding and white trim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wraparound deck with railings, stairs, and the detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, multiple windows, and the posts supporting the deck.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, deck extension, and the garage positioned to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck's curve, foundation, and the garage separated from the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
